list.name: namespace
list.label: Namespace
list.description: Kubernetes namespace filter (supports wildcards, e.g. tenant-* or *)

list.name: vm
list.label: VM
list.description: VM name filter (supports wildcards, e.g. node-* or *)

panels.title: Console Output
panels.description: Serial console output from virtual machines.

targets.expr: kubernetes_container_name:guest-console-log kubernetes_namespace_name:${namespace} kubernetes_labels.vm.kubevirt.io/name:${vm} | rename "kubernetes_labels.vm.kubevirt.io/name" as vm, kubernetes_namespace_name as namespace | fields _time, _msg, namespace, vm
